steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank is the subject of 'made a decision.' The sentence explicitly names the decision-makers as 'the judges for the 1947 Nobel Prize in Literature' — a plural group. The blank must be a plural pronoun referring to those judges.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — singular pronoun: Doesn't agree with the plural subject 'judges.' ✗
  • Choice B — singular or ambiguous pronoun: Fails to clearly refer to the plural group of judges. ✗
  • Choice C — 'They': Plural pronoun that agrees with 'judges' and correctly refers to the group making the decision. ✓
  • Choice D — singular pronoun: Doesn't agree with the plural 'judges.' ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
